mapper.update: UPDATE order_tickets ot SET ticket_used = true, ticket_used_date = TO_TIMESTAMP(#{resultDate}, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') FROM order_items oi WHERE ot.order_item_id = oi.id WHERE oi.partner_id = #{partnerId} AND ot.partner_order_code = #{orderSales} AND ot.ticket_used = false
mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT o.id FROM orders o JOIN order_items oi ON o.id = oi.order_id JOIN order_item_coupons oic ON oi.id = oic.order_item_id JOIN ticket_coupons tc ON oic.ticket_coupon_id = tc.id WHERE oi.partner_id = '0f46cad1-6fb4-4514-938f-d309850f0668' AND tc.used_at IS NULL LIMIT 100
mapper.update: UPDATE order_tickets ot SET ticket_used = true, ticket_used_date = TO_TIMESTAMP(#{resultDate}, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') FROM order_items oi WHERE ot.order_item_id = oi.id AND oi.partner_id = #{partnerId} AND ot.ticket_number = #{ticketNumber} AND ot.ticket_used = false
